patterns.name: Design specs need taste, not just structure
patterns.pattern: When writing design/UI specs, include a 'taste layer': real reference sites as north stars, the feeling/vibe to achieve, and explicit critique of what feels dated. Read ALL source materials before writing for coherence.

patterns.name: Daily tasks need dedup check
patterns.pattern: Before running any once-per-day task in heartbeat, check Slack history or a state file to confirm it hasn't already run today.

patterns.name: Check for prior completion before starting tasks
patterns.pattern: Before starting a queued task, check in-progress/ folder and deliverable outputs. A previous session may have completed it before crashing (API key errors, timeouts, etc).
